messages.content: Thank you for taking the time to meet with our team. It is not the news I was hoping to deliver, but I wanted to let you know that we will not be able to extend a Technology Internship Program offer at this time. As your recruiter, I am your advocate throughout the process and do not have any direct feedback that I am able to share.
